2603.16947.title: EmergeNav: Structured Embodied Inference for Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments
2603.16947.paper_summary: Zero-shot vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE) remains challenging for modern vision-language models (VLMs). Although these models encode useful semantic priors, their open-ended reasoning does not directly translate into stable long-horizon embodied execution. We argue that the key bottleneck is not missing knowledge alone, but missing an execution structure for organizing instruction following, perceptual grounding, temporal progress, and stage verification. We propose EmergeNav, a zero-shot framework that formulates continuous VLN as structured embodied inference. EmergeNav combines a Plan--Solve--Transition hierarchy for stage-structured execution, GIPE for goal-conditioned perceptual extraction, contrastive dual-memory reasoning for progress grounding, and role-separated Dual-FOV sensing for time-aligned local control and boundary verification. On VLN-CE, EmergeNav achieves strong zero-shot performance using only open-source VLM backbones and no task-specific training, explicit maps, graph search, or waypoint predictors, reaching 30.00 SR with Qwen3-VL-8B and 37.00 SR with Qwen3-VL-32B. These results suggest that explicit execution structure is a key ingredient for turning VLM priors into stable embodied navigation behavior.
2603.16947.paper_summary_zh: 零-shot 視覺與語言導航在連續環境中（VLN-CE）對於現代視覺語言模型（VLMs）仍然具有挑戰性。儘管這些模型編碼了有用的語義先驗，但它們的開放式推理並未直接轉化為穩定的長期具身執行。我們認為關鍵瓶頸不僅是缺乏知識，而是缺乏一個執行結構來組織指令跟隨、感知基礎、時間進展和階段驗證。我們提出了 EmergeNav，一個將連續 VLN 公式化為結構化具身推理的零-shot 框架。EmergeNav 結合了計劃—解決—過渡層次結構以進行階段結構化執行，GIPE 用於目標條件的感知提取，對比雙記憶推理用於進展基礎，以及角色分離的雙視場感知用於時間對齊的本地控制和邊界驗證。在 VLN-CE 上，EmergeNav 僅使用開源 VLM 骨幹，且不進行特定任務的訓練、明確地圖、圖搜尋或路徑點預測，便達到了 30.00 SR（使用 Qwen3-VL-8B）和 37.00 SR（使用 Qwen3-VL-32B）的強大零-shot 表現。這些結果表明，明確的執行結構是將 VLM 先驗轉化為穩定具身導航行為的關鍵成分。
2603.16947.author: Kun Luo et.al.
